name: Hefei Urban Construction Development Co., Ltd
summary: Hefei Urban Construction Development Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate development business under the Amber brand name. The company develops and constructs residential, commercial, and office buildings. It operates primarily in Hefei, Chaohu, Feidong, Bengbu, Xuancheng, Guangde, Sanya, Hainan, China, and internationally. The company is based in Hefei, China.
